description: VERIFIED LIVE: Basecamp 3/4 via your logged-in app.basecamp.com session (session bridge — no OAuth app). Your projects, project details, profile, and a project's messages / to-dos / comments / documents work cookie-only on the same-origin JSON API. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in account — projects (2), a project detail, my profile, and recordings (5 messages, 10 to-dos) all returned 200. Set your account ID (the number in app.basecamp.com/<account>/).

credentialFields.name: account
credentialFields.label: Basecamp account ID
credentialFields.description: The numeric account ID in your Basecamp URL — app.basecamp.com/<account>/.

tools.name: basecamp_projects
tools.description: Projects you have access to (id, name, description, dock of tools). VERIFIED.

tools.name: basecamp_project
tools.description: One project's details, including its 'dock' (message board, to-do set, schedule, etc. with their ids). VERIFIED.

tools.name: basecamp_my_profile
tools.description: Your Basecamp profile (id, name, email, admin flag). VERIFIED.

tools.name: basecamp_recordings
tools.description: Recordings of a given type inside one project (bucket): messages, to-dos, comments, documents or uploads. Returns title/content, author, status, urls. VERIFIED (Message + Todo).

params.name: bucket
params.description: The project id (bucket) to read from.
